posts.song: I Learned It All in Fifteen Seconds
posts.text: I Learned It All in Fifteen Seconds is about how fast the feed teaches you to feel. A cake with one good hand. A soldier coming home. A haircut. A subway heartbreak. You swipe away before the pain sets in and somehow it stays anyway.
drafts: I Learned It All in Fifteen Seconds is about how fast the feed teaches you to feel. A cake with one good hand. A soldier coming home. A haircut. A subway heartbreak. You swipe away before the pain sets in and somehow it stays anyway.
The line about the charger by my bed is true. Modern candle. Tiny altar. Perfectly healthy object to write a song around. Out June 5.
I have never left this little room and still somehow I have been to Paris and a honeymoon. The internet is a haunted study abroad program.

posts.song: I Learned It All in Fifteen Seconds
